name: strip_logic_functions
short_description: Strip the logic functions from LUTs, RAMBs, etc.
full_help:
strip_logic_functions

Description: 
Strip the logic functions from LUTs, RAMBs, etc.

Syntax: 
strip_logic_functions  [-cells <args>] [-exclude_cells <args>] [-quiet]
                       [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-cells]          Strip logic functions only for the given list of cells 
                    (not valid with -exclude_cells)
  [-exclude_cells]  Strip logic functions from the entire design with the 
                    exception of the given list of cells (not valid with 
                    -cells)
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Strip logic functions only for the given list of cells (not valid with -exclude_cells)
Strip logic functions from the entire design with the exception of the given list of cells (not valid with -cells)
Suspend message limits during command execution
